name: Postpartum Care Visit Codes
description: CPT codes for postpartum care visits including standalone postpartum care, preventive medicine visits in postpartum context, and quality reporting codes for postpartum care documentation. Used in prenatal and postpartum care (PPC) measures for timeliness of postpartum visits.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets
